subcodes.first_line: O beloved servants of the Divine Threshold! Ye are the manifestations of His Unity and the dawning-places of the light of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای درگاه الهینک سوگلی قوللری مظاهر حضرت احدیتک ظهوری و مشارق نور حقیقتک
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation
